summary: Bug fix verified: Reports page 'Total Customers' field now changes coherently when date filters are applied. The /api/analytics/dashboard endpoint correctly computes total_customers from unique customer phones in filtered bills, not from total customers in DB.

issues: Console warnings about chart width/height (-1) - cosmetic issue in Recharts library when tabs switch

passed_tests: Bug Fix: total_customers computed from unique customer phones in filtered bills (not from db.customers.count_documents)
Unfiltered: total_customers=7, total_bills=15 (all unique customers from all bills)
Gold and Diamond totals filter coherently with date filters
reference_analysis returns 'customers' field (unique customer count) alongside 'count' (bill count)
Frontend shows 'Showing filtered results from YYYY-MM-DD' badge when filters active
Frontend label changes from 'TOTAL CUSTOMERS' to 'UNIQUE CUSTOMERS' when filters active
Daily sales chart reflects filtered data
Reference tab table shows both Customers and Bills columns
critical_code_review_comments: server.py line ~1295-1300: unique_customer_phones set correctly populated from all filtered bills, then total_customers_in_period = len(unique_customer_phones)
server.py line ~1314: reference_analysis correctly tracks unique customers via _phones set and returns 'customers' count
Reports.js line ~144: filtersActive helper correctly checks dateFrom, dateTo, filterBranch, filterExecutive
Reports.js line ~248: Label conditionally shows 'Unique Customers' vs 'Total Customers' based on filtersActive
Reports.js line ~149: referenceData correctly maps customers field from API response

admin.method: Click 'Admin Login' link on login page

context_for_next_testing_agent: Bug fix confirmed working. Reports page date filter coherence is now correct. When filters are applied: total_customers shows unique customers from filtered bills (not all DB customers). Unfiltered gives 7 customers/15 bills. Filtered (>=2026-02-15) gives 5 customers/7 bills. Future date (2099) gives 0/0. Reference table now shows separate Customers and Bills columns.

bug_verification_details.original_issue: In Reports page, when date filters applied, 'Total Customers' field doesn't change
bug_verification_details.root_cause: total_customers was using db.customers.count_documents({}) instead of counting unique customers from filtered bills
bug_verification_details.fix_location: server.py line ~1295-1300: unique_customer_phones set populated from all_bills loop

mocked_apis.OTP_delivery: OTP codes shown on admin dashboard instead of actual SMS delivery
